mapper.select: SELECT f.STATUS, CASE WHEN f.SENDER_NO = #{memNo} THEN f.RECEIVER_NO ELSE f.SENDER_NO END AS friendNo, m.MEM_NAME AS friendName FROM FRIENDS f JOIN MEMBER m ON m.MEM_NO = ( CASE WHEN f.SENDER_NO = #{memNo} THEN f.RECEIVER_NO ELSE f.SENDER_NO END ) WHERE f.STATUS = 'Y' AND (f.SENDER_NO = #{memNo} OR f.RECEIVER_NO = #{memNo}) ORDER BY m.MEM_NAME ASC

SELECT m.MEM_NO, m.MEM_NAME, f.STATUS FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN FRIENDS f ON ( (f.SENDER_NO = #{senderNo} AND f.RECEIVER_NO = m.MEM_NO) OR (f.SENDER_NO = m.MEM_NO AND f.RECEIVER_NO = #{senderNo}) ) WHERE m.MEM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND m.MEM_NO != #{senderNo} AND m.MEM_NO NOT IN ( SELECT MEM_NO FROM AUTHORITIES WHERE AUTHORITY IN ('ROLE_ADMIN', 'ROLE_MASTER') ) ORDER BY m.MEM_NAME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FRIENDS(SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, STATUS) VALUES (#{senderNo}, #{receiverNo}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FRIENDS WHERE (SENDER_NO = #{senderNo} AND RECEIVER_NO = #{receiverNo}) OR (SENDER_NO = #{receiverNo} AND RECEIVER_NO = #{senderNo})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FRIENDS WHERE (SENDER_NO = #{senderNo} AND RECEIVER_NO = #{receiverNo}) OR (SENDER_NO = #{receiverNo} AND RECEIVER_NO = #{senderNo})
mapper.select: SELECT f.SENDER_NO AS senderNo, f.RECEIVER_NO AS receiverNo, f.STATUS AS status, m.MEM_NO AS memNo, m.MEM_NAME AS friendName FROM FRIENDS f JOIN MEMBER m ON m.MEM_NO = f.SENDER_NO WHERE f.RECEIVER_NO = #{receiverNo} AND f.STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY f.SENDER_NO DESC
